name: Mediterranean Stir-Fried Beef
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Olive oil or cooking oil
1 package (16 oz) Frozen vegetables mix (broccoli, cauliflower, and carrots)
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze the beef and thinly slice it across the grain into bite-size strips.
2. In a bowl, combine water, vinegar, onion, pepper, and red pepper.
3. Add the meat to the marinade mixture and mix well. Let marinate for 15 minutes at room temperature.
4. Cook the linguine according to package directions. Drain and toss with butter. Keep warm.
5. Reserve the marinade and stir cornstarch into it.
6. In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat. Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
7. Add the meat to the skillet and stir-fry for 3 minutes until browned.
8. Remove the meat from the skillet and add the remaining oil.
9. Stir in the frozen vegetables and cook for 4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Add the mushrooms and cook for 1 minute more.
11. Return the marinated meat to the skillet and stir in the cornstarch mixture. Cook until bubbly, about 2 minutes.
12. Arrange the cooked linguine and meat on a platter. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
13. Serve hot, garnished with additional Parmesan if desired.
